member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu2DPhysicsOptions
member.summary: Option set for creating a Bepu-physics enabled 2D-style primitive entity.
member.remarks: Extends with a Bepu . The default is a dynamic having an empty . Although termed "2D", simulation occurs in 3D space with constraints limiting motion to the XY plane.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu2DPhysicsOptions.Component
member.summary: Gets or sets the Bepu collidable component to attach. Defaults to a new with an empty .

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu2DPhysicsOptions.IncludeCollider
member.summary: When true (default), a collider shape matching the primitive type is auto-created and added. When false, the is attached without shapes; you can add shapes later.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu3DPhysicsOptions
member.summary: Option set for creating a Bepu-physics enabled 3D primitive entity.
member.remarks: Inherits geometry / rendering options from and adds a configurable Bepu . The default is a dynamic with an empty ; shape(s) are typically populated later by helper extensions based on the chosen primitive type.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu3DPhysicsOptions.Component
member.summary: Gets or sets the Bepu collidable component to attach. Defaults to a new dynamic containing an empty .
member.remarks: Replace with a for immovable geometry or preconfigure collider children before passing the options instance to a creation helper.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu3DPhysicsOptions.IncludeCollider
member.summary: When true (default), a collider shape matching the primitive type is auto-created and added. When false, the is attached without shapes; you can add shapes later.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Body2DComponent
member.summary: Dynamic body constrained to a 2D plane (XY) while still using Bepu's 3D solver.
member.remarks: This component locks angular motion to the Z axis by zeroing the X/Y inverse inertia terms once at attach time and applies a small pre-solve velocity correction each frame to drive the body back onto the Z = 0 plane. The correction avoids post-solve teleports which can inject energy and destabilize piles, especially with convex hulls.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Body2DComponent.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new . Interpolation is enabled by default.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Body2DComponent.AttachInner(BepuPhysics.RigidPose,BepuPhysics.BodyInertia,BepuPhysics.Collidables.TypedIndex)
member.remarks: Keeps the shape-derived inertia so roll (Z angular motion) works and zeros X/Y inverse inertia to restrict yaw/pitch. Also applies mild stability tweaks for convex hull colliders (damping and recovery velocity cap).

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Body2DComponent.HasConvexHull(Stride.BepuPhysics.Definitions.Colliders.ICollider)
member.summary: Returns true if the collider hierarchy contains at least one .

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Body2DComponent.SimulationUpdate(Stride.BepuPhysics.BepuSimulation,System.Single)
member.summary: Called before the physics tick to perform pre-solve corrections.
member.param: Active simulation.
Fixed time step size in seconds.
member.remarks: Applies a proportional velocity correction on the Z axis to drive the body back to the plane (Z = 0): vZ = -Position.Z. This avoids injecting energy while keeping the body constrained to 2D.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Body2DComponent.AfterSimulationUpdate(Stride.BepuPhysics.BepuSimulation,System.Single)
member.summary: Called after the physics tick. Intentionally left empty for this component.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.CameraComponentExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for to facilitate raycasting functionality.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.CameraComponentExtensions.RaycastMouse(Stride.Engine.CameraComponent,Stride.Engine.ScriptComponent,System.Single,Stride.BepuPhysics.HitInfo@,Stride.BepuPhysics.CollisionMask)
member.summary: Performs a raycast using the mouse's screen position.
member.param: The used to calculate the ray.
The providing access to the mouse position.
The maximum distance for the raycast.
When this method returns, contains the if the raycast hits a collider, otherwise null.
Specifies the collision mask to filter which objects the raycast can hit. Defaults to .
member.returns: true if the raycast hit a collider; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.CameraComponentExtensions.Raycast(Stride.Engine.CameraComponent,Stride.Core.Mathematics.Vector2,System.Single,Stride.BepuPhysics.HitInfo@,Stride.BepuPhysics.CollisionMask)
member.summary: Performs a raycast using a screen position.
member.param: The used to calculate the ray.
The screen position in normalized device coordinates (NDC).
The maximum distance for the raycast.
When this method returns, contains the if the raycast hits a collider, otherwise null.
Specifies the collision mask to filter which objects the raycast can hit. Defaults to .
member.returns: true if the raycast hit a collider; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.CollidableGizmoScript
member.summary: Toggles visualization gizmos for all instances in the current scene when a specified key is pressed.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.CollidableGizmoScript.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the key used to toggle collidable gizmos on and off. Default: .

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.CollidableGizmoScript.Color
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional emissive color applied to created gizmos. When , the default material color is used.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.CollidableGizmoScript.SizeFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets the size multiplier applied to created gizmos. Defaults to 1.0.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.CollidableGizmoScript.Visible
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether gizmos are currently active in the scene.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Colliders.ConeCollider
member.summary: Provides helpers to construct Bepu instances from a cone primitive mesh.
member.remarks: Builds a convex hull from a generated cone mesh. If no explicit size is provided, default values are taken from . The cone mesh is generated with 16 radial segments via .

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Colliders.ConeCollider.Create(System.Nullable{System.Numerics.Vector3})
member.summary: Creates a Bepu from a cone primitive mesh.
member.param: Optional size in world units: X = radius, Y = height, Z is unused and ignored. When null, defaults from are used.
member.returns: A whose hull is computed from the generated cone mesh.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Colliders.TeapotCollider
member.summary: Provides helpers to construct Bepu instances from a teapot primitive mesh.
member.remarks: Builds a convex hull from a generated teapot mesh. If no explicit size is provided, default values are taken from . The teapot mesh is generated with 16 radial segments via .

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Colliders.TeapotCollider.Create(System.Nullable{System.Single})
member.summary: Creates a Bepu from a teapot primitive mesh.
member.param: Optional size (uniform scale) in world units. When null, defaults from are used.
member.returns: A whose hull is computed from the generated teapot mesh.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Colliders.TorusCollider
member.summary: Provides helpers to construct Bepu instances from a torus primitive mesh.
member.remarks: Builds a convex hull from a generated torus mesh. If no explicit radii are provided, default values are taken from . The torus mesh is generated via .

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Colliders.TorusCollider.Create(System.Nullable{System.Single},System.Nullable{System.Single})
member.summary: Creates a Bepu from a torus primitive mesh.
member.param: Optional major radius of the torus. When null, defaults from are used.
Optional minor radius (thickness) of the torus. When null, defaults from are used.
member.returns: A whose hull is computed from the generated torus mesh.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Colliders.TriangularPrismCollider
member.summary: Provides helpers to construct Bepu instances from a triangular prism primitive mesh.
member.remarks: Builds a convex hull from a generated triangular prism mesh. If no explicit size is provided, default values are taken from . The triangular cross-section lies in the X/Y plane and the prism extends along the Z axis (depth). X specifies the base width of the triangle, Y specifies the triangle height, and Z specifies the prism depth.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Colliders.TriangularPrismCollider.Create(System.Nullable{Stride.Core.Mathematics.Vector3})
member.summary: Creates a Bepu from a triangular prism primitive mesh.
member.param: Optional size in world units: X = triangle base width, Y = triangle height, Z = prism depth. When null, defaults from are used.
member.returns: A whose hull is computed from the generated triangular prism mesh.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.DebugRenderComponentScript
member.summary: Script that ensures a is added to the owning once the scene is ready (when visibility groups are present).
member.remarks:
The enables Bepu physics debug rendering. The debug component itself exposes a Visible property and can be toggled at runtime using the keyboard key Keys.F11 (see DebugRenderComponent in the Bepu integration).
Important details:
- Adding this script/component to a single entity in the scene will activate the debug mesh rendering for all Bepu physics entities in that scene (the debug rendering is global per-scene).
- The component in this script is created with Visible = false by default to avoid enabling debug rendering unexpectedly.
- When a physics body is not awake, its debug mesh is rendered with a lighter color to indicate the sleeping/non-awake state.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.DebugRenderComponentScript.Visible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the debug mesh is initially when added.

member.name: F:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.DebugRenderComponentScript._debugAdded
member.summary: True when a has already been added to the entity. This prevents adding multiple debug components on subsequent frames.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.DebugRenderComponentScript.Update
member.summary: Called once per frame by the engine. When the scene contains one or more visibility groups and the debug component has not yet been added, this method creates and adds a to the .
member.remarks: This method intentionally performs a cheap count check every frame and only performs the addition once. After the component is added, the component's visibility can be toggled at runtime by pressing Keys.F11 (handled by ). See the class-level remarks for additional behavior: the debug renderer is global to the scene, the component is added invisible by default here, and sleeping physics bodies use a lighter mesh color.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.EntityExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for the class to simplify adding Bepu 2D and 3D physics components.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.EntityExtensions.AddBepu2DPhysics(Stride.Engine.Entity,Stride.CommunityToolkit.Rendering.ProceduralModels.Primitive2DModelType,Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu2DPhysicsOptions)
member.summary: Adds Bepu 2D physics components to the entity.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.EntityExtensions.AddBepuPhysics(Stride.Engine.Entity,Stride.CommunityToolkit.Rendering.ProceduralModels.PrimitiveModelType,Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu3DPhysicsOptions)
member.summary: Adds Bepu 3D physics components to the entity.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Extensions.ConvexHullColliderExtensions
member.summary: Helpers to build Bepu instances from Stride procedural meshes.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Extensions.ConvexHullColliderExtensions.ToConvexHullCollider(Stride.Graphics.GeometricMeshData{Stride.Graphics.VertexPositionNormalTexture})
member.summary: Builds a from the raw mesh data.
member.remarks: Uses the mesh vertices and indices without welding. Prefer for stability when the source mesh contains duplicated vertices.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Extensions.ConvexHullColliderExtensions.ToConvexHullColliderWithWelding(Stride.Graphics.GeometricMeshData{Stride.Graphics.VertexPositionNormalTexture})
member.summary: Builds a from the mesh after welding near-duplicate vertices.
member.param: Source mesh data.
member.returns: Convex hull collider with welded vertex data.
member.remarks: Welding reduces degenerate faces/edges from duplicated vertices (common in authored meshes), improving stability in dense contact scenarios.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Extensions.ConvexHullColliderExtensions.WeldVertices(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Stride.Graphics.VertexPositionNormalTexture},System.Int32[],System.Single,Stride.Core.Mathematics.Vector3[]@,System.UInt32[]@)
member.summary: Welds vertices that are within of each other and remaps the index buffer accordingly.
member.param: Input vertex array.
Input index array.
Distance threshold for welding in world units.
Unique welded positions.
Remapped indices targeting .

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.GameExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for the class to simplify common game setup tasks for the Bepu Physics engine.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.GameExtensions.SetupBase2DScene(Stride.Engine.Game)
member.summary: Sets up a default 2D scene for the game, similar to creating an empty project through the editor.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.GameExtensions.SetupBase3DScene(Stride.Engine.Game)
member.summary: Sets up a default 3D scene for the game, similar to creating an empty project through the editor.
member.remarks:
This method performs the following setup operations in sequence:
1. Adds a default GraphicsCompositor to the game's SceneSystem and applies a clean UI stage.
2. Adds a camera to the game and sets it up with a MouseLookCamera component.
3. Adds a directional light to the game scene.
4. Adds ground geometry to the game scene.
member.param: The Game instance for which the base 3D scene will be set up.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.GameExtensions.Add2DGround(Stride.Engine.Game,System.String,System.Nullable{Stride.Core.Mathematics.Vector2},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a 2D ground entity to the specified game with optional name, size, and collider settings.
member.remarks: The ground entity is created using a cube primitive model and is suitable for 2D gameplay scenarios. The default size and name are defined by and , respectively.
member.param: The game instance to which the ground entity will be added.
The name to assign to the ground entity. If null, a default name is used.
The size of the ground entity in world units. If null, a default size is applied.
Specifies whether a collider should be included with the ground entity. Set to to add a collider; otherwise, .
member.returns: The newly created ground entity added to the game.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.GameExtensions.Add3DGround(Stride.Engine.Game,System.String,System.Nullable{Stride.Core.Mathematics.Vector2},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a 3D ground entity to the game.
member.param: Game instance.
Optional entity name; defaults to .
Optional ground size; defaults to .
If true, attaches a .

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.GameExtensions.Create2DPrimitive(Stride.Games.IGame,Stride.CommunityToolkit.Rendering.ProceduralModels.Primitive2DModelType,Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu2DPhysicsOptions)
member.summary: Creates a 2D primitive entity and attaches a Bepu physics component as defined by .

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.GameExtensions.Create3DPrimitive(Stride.Games.IGame,Stride.CommunityToolkit.Rendering.ProceduralModels.PrimitiveModelType,Stride.CommunityToolkit.Bepu.Bepu3DPhysicsOptions)
member.summary: Creates a 3D primitive entity and attaches a Bepu physics component as defined by .
member.param: The game instance.
Which primitive shape to create.
Options for both the primitive geometry and physics. If null, defaults will be used.
